description_long: This object is a small, simplified airplane with a compact fuselage and short, straight wings extending from either side. The wings are positioned at a mid-level on the fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The nose is rounded, and the cockpit area is slightly raised but not distinctly separated from the rest of the fuselage. The airplane appears to lack visible engines or detailed landing gear, giving it a stylized, minimalistic appearance. The surface is uniformly light gray, with no visible markings or color variations.
description: A small, stylized light gray airplane with mid-mounted straight wings and a conventional tail, lacking visible engines or landing gear.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from the front, showing the rounded nose, mid-mounted wings, and the vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the length of the fuselage, the straight wings, and the tail assembly, with the cockpit area slightly raised.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the tail section, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same features from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage, single-seat configuration.
